name: sentinel-guard
description: Resilient request layer with semantic caching (MemPalace + sentence-transformers), adaptive per-agent rate limiting, request queuing with backpressure, and a real-time monitoring dashboard. All agent traffic should pass through sentinel-guard first.

endpoints./proxy: Forward a request to a named agent with caching and rate limiting
endpoints./stats: Full runtime statistics (cache, rate limits, queues)
endpoints./events: SSE stream for live dashboard updates
endpoints./cache/check: Check cache for a query without forwarding
endpoints./cache/store: Manually store a response in cache
endpoints./rate/check/{agent}: Check rate limit status for an agent
endpoints./queue/status: View queue depths for all agents
